# User

## Profile

Name: Jordan. Senior backend engineer at Meridian Labs, 6 years experience. Primary languages are Go and Rust. Comfortable with TypeScript but prefers server-side work.

## Preferences

### Communication

- Prefers terse responses, no filler
- Wants diffs shown inline, not summarized
- Asks for confirmation before destructive operations
- Does not want emoji in code or commit messages

### Code Style

- Favors explicit error handling over panics
- Prefers table-driven tests with descriptive subtest names
- Uses short variable names in tight scopes
- Wants imports grouped: stdlib, external, internal

### Review Style

- Cares most about correctness and security
- Tolerates minor style inconsistencies if the logic is sound
- Wants performance concerns flagged but not prematurely optimized
- Expects tests alongside code changes, not in a follow-up

## Working Hours

Available weekdays 09:00-18:00 CET. Heartbeat runs outside these hours should not send notifications unless a blocking issue is found.
